description: §16.4 clean neg — the `${children}` spread alias re-parses successfully and SHALL NOT fire E-COMPONENT-021, in an otherwise byte-identical component body to the reject case (only the spread spelling differs).
rationale: §16.4 documents `${children}` as the (impl#1-supported) legacy alias for the unnamed children spread. CE's local re-parse of `Wrap`'s body succeeds with this form, so no E-COMPONENT-021 is raised.
